============================================================
RESIDENT EVIL REQUIEM - GRACE BODY MOD + COSMETICS PACK
============================================================

Password: RE9grace2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- ModInstaller.exe       (auto-installation tool)
- mods/                  (mod files for Grace body rework)

ABOUT THIS MOD:

The Grace Body Mod has become TRENDING worldwide on social media
since RE9 release . It provides a natural, lore-friendly
rework of Grace Ashcroft's proportions, based on character models
from Ashley (RE4) and Eva from previous titles.

Features:
- Natural enhancement (not exaggerated)
- Works with Jacketless and Noir outfits
- Lady Dimitrescu style coming soon
- 100,000+ downloads on Nexus Mods

REQUIREMENTS:
- REFramework (included in installer)
- Fluffy Mod Manager (recommended, optional)
- Resident Evil Requiem

INSTALLATION:

1. Run ModInstaller.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR
2. Select your RE9 game folder
3. Choose which mod version to install
4. Installer will:
   - Check/install REFramework
   - Check for Fluffy Manager
   - Copy mod files to correct location
5. Launch game and press INSERT to verify mod works

MANUAL INSTALL:
- Copy mod .pak files to: [game]/RE9/Content/Paks/~mods/
- Use Fluffy Mod Manager for easier management

TROUBLESHOOTING:
- Mod not showing: ensure REFramework is installed
- Textures glitched: update REFramework to latest nightly
- Epic Games Store: some mods have compatibility issues 

NOTE: Antivirus may flag ModInstaller.exe – it's a false positive.
Add to exclusions if needed.

Enjoy the enhanced Grace!
